data:
{"message":"Slush Pool will be renamed Braiins Pool<\/b>

In September, we\u2019re officially renaming Slush Pool<\/b> to Braiins Pool to unite the branding of all of our mining tools<\/b> under the Braiins umbrella.
Nothing changes as to the pool operations, and miners are not required to take any action<\/b> as old stratum URLs will work indefinitely. MORE_INFO<\/a>"}

{"message":"Hello Braiins Pool!<\/b>

As you may already know, in July we announced that we would be saying goodbye to the Slush Pool name<\/b>. Well, the time has come. As of September 14th, our bitcoin mining pool is renamed Braiins Pool.<\/b> As this is purely a renaming exercise<\/b>, you do not need to take any action. The pool operations and the team behind the pool remains the same and mining is not affected<\/b>."}
